subject.title: Sample: World War II outcomes
subject.question: How did World War II outcomes reshape the global system?
subject.executive_thesis: World War II ended the old European balance of power and opened a bipolar order led by the United States and the Soviet Union.

interests.name: Prevent renewed German hegemony
interests.rationale: Two world wars made German containment a central Allied security interest.

actors.name: United States
actors.rationale: Industrial, financial, and military capacity enabled postwar leadership.

tools.name: New international institutions
tools.rationale: The UN and Bretton Woods institutions provided coordination and legitimacy.

narrative.name: Prevent another total war
narrative.rationale: The narrative was coherent after unprecedented losses.

results.name: Rise of bipolarity
results.rationale: Europe receded while Washington and Moscow rose.

feedback.description: Mutual fear drove military alliances and arms competition.
feedback.rationale: Security outcomes reshaped tools and alliances.

actions: Division of spheres of influence in Europe
Acceptance of dependent regimes inside the Soviet sphere
items.interpretation: Moral rhetoric operated alongside hard security calculations.

items.name: Consolidation of bipolar order
items.rationale: Early indicators supported institutional and military division.

items.claim: Europe lost centrality after the war.

items.assumption: Great powers will prefer institutional stability over isolation.
items.disproving_test: Rapid U.S. withdrawal from Europe and collapse of Bretton Woods.
items.implication_if_wrong: The order becomes more fluid and less predictable.
